A results-driven engineer with 10+ years of experience building and transforming enterprise network infrastructure across the Asia Pacific region. I thrive on complexity — whether leading a 13-country firewall rollout or architecting a region-wide SD-WAN to SASE transformation. Equally passionate about people as technology: a natural mentor who has spent years teaching and helping others grow. Currently expanding into AI & automation to bring the next wave of innovation to network operations.
